summary: Reviewed the four critic finding files and existing captured Inngest notes. No new fetch was needed: the actionable patch/polish recommendations are supported by official Inngest captures already in the vault, while uncaptured versioning, observability, RAWR-source-verification, SDK-adapter, and provider/IP-allowlist areas should remain caveats or follow-up scope.

artifactWrites.summary: Post-critic fetch log documenting the checked critic gaps, the no-new-fetch decision, and why existing official Inngest captures are sufficient for patch/polish.
